Interface LoggerAdapter<P,L>

Type Parameters:
P - platform audience type (Player, ServerPlayerEntity, etc.)
L - prefixed logger implementation type
public interface LoggerAdapter<P,L>
Shared logger adapter API for platform-specific wrappers.

      Returns the underlying logger core.

      core logger instance

    • getPrefixedLoggers

      prefixed logger map

      prefixed logger

      default boolean isLevelEnabled(LogLevel level)
      Returns whether the supplied log level is enabled for the default target.
      Parameters:
      level - log level to check
      Returns:
      true when formatting and delivery should proceed

    • isConsoleStripFormatting

      default boolean isConsoleStripFormatting()
      Returns whether console formatting is stripped.

      true if formatting is stripped

      default boolean isConsoleUseGradient()
      Returns whether console gradients are enabled.
      Returns:
      true if gradients are enabled

      default String[] resolveColorsForLevel(LogLevel level, boolean forConsole)
      Resolves color palette for a log level.

      level - log level
      forConsole - true to resolve console colors
      Returns:
      array of color strings

    • parseMessage

      default net.kyori.adventure.text.Component parseMessage(Object message, LogLevel level, LogTarget target, @Nullable P player, @Nullable @Nullable Collection<? extends P> players, Object... placeholdersArgs)
      Parses message into a component using logger pipeline.
      Parameters:
      message - message input
      level - log level
      target - log target
      player - direct player target
      players - collection of target players
      placeholdersArgs - placeholder arguments
      Returns:
      parsed component

      player - direct player target
      players - collection of target players
      placeholdersArgs - placeholder arguments

      parsed component without prefix

      prefix - prefix text

    • broadcast

      default void broadcast(Object message)
      Broadcasts a message to console and players.
      Parameters:
      message - message to send

    • setPrefixedLoggerEnabled

      default void setPrefixedLoggerEnabled(String name, boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables a prefixed logger by name.
      Parameters:
      name - logger name
      enabled - whether logging is enabled

    • send

      default void send(LogLevel level, Object message, @Nullable P player, @Nullable @Nullable Collection<? extends P> players, LogTarget target, boolean broadcast, Object... placeholders)
      Sends a message using the configured logger pipeline.
      Parameters:
      level - log level
      message - message to send
      player - direct player target
      players - player collection target
      target - log target
      broadcast - whether to broadcast to all players
      placeholders - placeholder arguments
